locStrings.name: popupMainText
locStrings.defaultValue:
Are you sure you want to quit?
All progress will be lost.

Localization.Name: RediMake Item Fabricator
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: KE Group
Item Type: Item Fabricator
 
This industry standard item fabricator was the first to utilize the now prevalent blueprint system which allowed owners to craft duplicates of name brand products from the comfort of home.
